Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Continued To Feb-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Anthony Head, Esq. for Plaintiff Creditors trade Association, Inc. Dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's witnesses Sandra Hildalgo and Debra Douglas were sworn and direct examined.
PLTF EXH #1 - 2 Pages Credit application --------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Invoice in the amount of $187,990.09 ---------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants Healthscan America, Inc. Dba Ameri, Seqouia technologies, LLC., Craig Bittner and Darlene Gee.
Principal of $187,990.09.
Interest of $45,124.00.
Costs of $344.50
Attorney's fees per Motion.
For the total of $233,458.59.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
Counsel stipulated for the return of exhibis in open court.

Feb. 6, 2004 Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
